API Reference
=============

Top-Level Package
-----------------

The package root re-exports the most common public symbols:
``polyview.MultiViewDataset``, ``polyview.MultiviewKMeans``, and
fusion/base utilities.

.. automodule:: polyview
   :no-members:

Datasets
--------

.. automodule:: polyview.dataset.multiview
   :members:
   :undoc-members:
   :show-inheritance:

   :members:

   :members:
   :undoc-members:
   :show-inheritance:
